authority.department: Labour & Employment Department, Government of Himachal Pradesh

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Himachal Pradesh.

rules.title: Review Himachal Pradesh Shops and Commercial Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Himachal Pradesh Shops and Commercial Establishments legislation is applicable.

citations.reference: Himachal Pradesh Shops and Commercial Establishments Act

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and notices prescribed under Himachal Pradesh labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices, abstracts and employee information required under applicable labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Himachal Pradesh provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

citations.reference: Himachal Pradesh Shops and Commercial Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure wages comply with the latest minimum wage notifications applicable in Himachal Pradesh.

rules.title: Review Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the Himachal Pradesh Labour Welfare Fund, where applicable.

citations.reference: Himachal Pradesh Labour Welfare Fund legislation

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual review of registrations, labour records, wage compliance and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for statutory filings, inspections, licence renewals and labour law due dates.
